hm, I wonder why this never came up in mainline linux kernel where they do build Lustre on all sorts of obscure architectures.
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 0300a6efd226f138b3f6968f82b0a4313074a1a6 by Oleg Drokin

parents.subject: LU-7943 mdd: Move assignment after LASSERT()

commit.subject: LU-10964 build: armv7 client build fixes
commit.message:
LU-10964 build: armv7 client build fixes

This commit is supposed to fix armv7 Lustre client
build, mostly 64-bit division related changes.

Change-Id: I93d83d577351c1a1053e39a162cb1e85fc4e8aa3
Signed-off-by: Andrew Perepechko <c17827@cray.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/32194
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <c17826@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
